components.name: Button
components.accessibilityNotes: Meets WCAG AA contrast for all variants. Focus ring visible via focus-visible. Disabled state uses opacity-50 and pointer-events-none.
components.usageGuidance: Use primary for the main call-to-action. Use secondary for supporting actions. Use ghost for low-emphasis inline actions. Use destructive for irreversible actions.

components.name: Input
components.accessibilityNotes: Focus ring visible via focus-visible. Pair with FormField for label and error message accessibility.
components.usageGuidance: Always wrap in FormField to provide an accessible label. Use the error prop on FormField to display validation messages.

components.name: Select
components.accessibilityNotes: Uses Base UI Select which manages ARIA roles and keyboard navigation automatically.
components.usageGuidance: Use for choosing from a list of 5 or more options. For fewer options, prefer Radio.

components.name: Checkbox
components.accessibilityNotes: Checked state indicated via data-[checked] attribute. Focus ring visible via focus-visible.
components.usageGuidance: Use for independent boolean options. Use a group of checkboxes for multi-select from a list.

components.name: Radio
components.accessibilityNotes: Checked state indicated via data-[checked] attribute. Wrap in a RadioGroup for proper ARIA grouping.
components.usageGuidance: Always wrap in a labeled RadioGroup. Use when only one option can be selected from a list.

components.name: Switch
components.accessibilityNotes: Checked state indicated via data-[checked] attribute. Rendered as a native button with role="switch" via Base UI.
components.usageGuidance: Use for immediate binary toggles that take effect without a form submit.

components.name: Slider
components.accessibilityNotes: Keyboard navigable via arrow keys. Value announced by screen readers via aria-valuenow.
components.usageGuidance: Use for selecting a value within a continuous range. Provide visible min/max labels for context.

components.name: Tabs
components.accessibilityNotes: Arrow keys navigate between tabs. Active tab panel is linked via aria-controls.
components.usageGuidance: Use to divide content into parallel sections of the same hierarchy. Avoid nesting tabs.

components.name: Menu
components.accessibilityNotes: Arrow keys navigate menu items. Escape closes the menu. Items have role="menuitem".
components.usageGuidance: Use for contextual actions accessible from a trigger button. Keep items under 10 for usability.

components.name: Form Field
components.accessibilityNotes: Label is associated with the field via aria-labelledby. Error messages are associated via aria-describedby. Required indicator is hidden from screen readers.
components.usageGuidance: Always wrap form inputs in FormField. Pass the error message string to show validation state.

rules: Always import components from their own directory (e.g. `./components/button/button`).
Never hard-code color hex values in component or page code. Reference CSS custom properties (e.g. `var(--color-action-primary)`) or use the generated component classes.
Never override component token variables inline. If a token value needs to change for a variant or context, regenerate with an updated config.
Wrap every form input in FormField to ensure accessible labels and error messages.
Button: use `variant="primary"` for the main call-to-action per screen. Do not use two primary buttons side-by-side.
Button: use `variant="destructive"` only for irreversible operations. Show a confirmation dialog before triggering the action.
Spacing: use the generated spacing tokens (space.component.* for intra-component spacing, space.layout.* for page-level spacing). Base unit is derived from density="balanced".
Typography: display headings use font.family.display (Inter). Body text and UI labels use font.family.body (Inter).
Color: all interactive elements must meet WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text and UI components). The generated token set guarantees this for the semantic layer.
Dark mode: activate by setting `data-theme="dark"` on the root element. Do not fork component files for dark mode; all tokens resolve automatically.
Do not import from `@base-ui-components/react` directly in application code. Import from the generated component wrappers instead.
